mnemonics.title: Row-Major Order Formula
mnemonics.content: Address = B + (i*N + j)*w, where B is base address, i is row index, N is number of columns, j is column index, and w is element size

mnemonics.title: Column-Major Order Formula
mnemonics.content: Address = B + (j*M + i)*w, where B is base address, j is column index, M is number of rows, i is row index, and w is element size

mnemonics.title: Cache Performance Rule
mnemonics.content: Rightmost index varies fastest in nested loops for best performance in row-major storage (e.g., C, C++, Java)
